creator: godevilove@ya.ru
text:
I always only build from ports.

> I assume you have provided greater detail to the developer in order for him to say there is a problem with the build.

No, I provided the same info. Antoine said there's something wrong with my build after I started debugging and there were all those 'Error while reading shared library symbols:    Dwarf Error: wrong version in compilation unit header (is 4, should be 2) [in module /usr/local/lib/gcc6/libgcc_s.so]'.

The crash occurs after some time (up to 30 sec was my longest session, I think) of using the forwarded program's window. The session may last longer if I do 0 actions over the forwarded window.

AFAIR which program's window I forward - it doesn't really matter, but last tests I did on firefox and telegram.
